title: OldYLevels
description:
Changes the Overworld height to the old Y range, 0-256.

This will basically crop off parts of your world if you don't pregenerate the world on an earlier version of the game.
body:
## OldYLevels

Change the Overworld's Y range back to the old 0-256 range. 

That's it! Just put it in your `world/datapacks/` folder or load it locally and it will work.
